projectDescription: Coursify is an AI-powered learning platform that generates structured, university-level courses and research articles on any topic in seconds using real-time deep web research.
keyFeatures: AI course generation from any topic or university syllabus
Real-time deep web research by autonomous AI agents
Structured course outlines with modules, sections, and progress tracking
Interactive rich reader with Markdown, LaTeX math, and code syntax highlighting
Research mode for standalone deep-dive articles
Free public course library — no account required
publicApiSurface: Course generation (Flash mode) — 5 free AI generations/month
Course generation (Deep-Research Pro mode) — Pro plan
Dashboard — saved courses and generation history
Export to Markdown & PDF — Pro plan
Provider API key (bring-your-own-key) — saved in account settings
